H2O · H2 · FUNCTIONAL WATER IN DAILY RITUAL
Modern wellness problem

Oxidative stress starts quietly.

Every day, the body is exposed to stress, processed foods, pollution, poor sleep, UV exposure and environmental load. These stressors can create free radicals — unstable molecules that look for electrons from nearby molecules.

When free-radical activity builds faster than the body can keep in balance, oxidative stress can accumulate quietly through daily habits, lifestyle and environment.

Free radicals and imbalance
Free radicals are unstable molecules. When their activity builds faster than the body can keep in balance, oxidative stress can quietly accumulate over time.
8 Excellent Healthy Functionals

Why choose Watersource? Eight water properties, explained simply.

A concise guide to the eight functional water properties — hydrogen-rich water, alkaline pH, negative ORP, micro-cluster water, oxygenation, ionic minerals, filtration and acidic water.

01 / 08HYDROGEN
H₂

Hydrogen-Rich Water

Hydrogen-rich water works as a powerful antioxidant property that neutralises toxic free radicals, supports anti-inflammatory wellness and helps improve daily energy.

02 / 08ALKALINE
pH

Moderate Alkaline pH

Alkaline water has the capacity to neutralise acid and supports acid–alkaline balance through daily drinking water.

03 / 08ORP
−ORP

Oxidation Reduction Potential

ORP is an antioxidant reading. Negative ORP, shown up to -800 mV, helps reduce free-radical damage from UV exposure, pollution, pesticides and chemicals.

04 / 0857HZ
57Hz

Small Micro-Cluster Water

57Hz small micro-cluster water has smaller water molecule clusters that pass through cell membranes more effectively for stronger hydration and faster nutrient absorption.

05 / 08OXYGEN
O₂

Oxygenated Alkaline Ionised Water

Alkaline ionised water is oxygenated water that provides vital oxygen for cells and supports energy, better sleep, immune enhancement and cell recovery.

06 / 08MINERALS
CaMgKMinerals

Ionic Minerals

Loaded with ionic minerals including calcium, magnesium, potassium and sodium, the mineral profile improves metabolism, supports immunity and restores self-healing power.

07 / 08FILTER
πFilter

Filtration / Hexagonal Water

Two powerful filters with TM π water technology, hexagonal structure and microorganism ceramic create resonance energy beyond ordinary alkaline water.

08 / 08ACIDIC
Acidic

Acidic Water

Acidic water is used externally for killing bacteria, disinfecting, healing support and stopping itch.

These eight functionals define the water profile: hydrogen-rich water, alkaline pH, ORP, micro-cluster hydration, oxygenation, ionic minerals, hexagonal filtration and acidic water settings.

Our founder · Mrs Wee

From Evergreen to WaterSource: a lifelong belief that health is wealth.

Mrs Wee, founder of Evergreen Health / WaterSource and co-founder of Evergreen Group, brings with her a rare combination of business experience, resilience and wellness conviction. Evergreen Group has been established since 1973, and under Mrs Wee’s entrepreneurial journey, the Evergreen name grew from a stationery business into a trusted household brand.

With a background in biology, Mrs Wee became deeply interested in the role of water in everyday health. This led her to establish Evergreen Health in 2009, with the purpose of introducing alkaline ionised hydrogen water education to more households in Singapore.

For Mrs Wee, WaterSource has never been only about selling a machine. It is about helping people understand what they drink every day, why water quality matters, and how small daily choices can support a better wellness foundation. This education-first belief continues to shape WaterSource today — from product consultation to after-sales care.

“Health is wealth — and better daily living begins with what we choose every day.”

Speak with a WaterSource specialist →

WaterSource questions, answered.

What is WaterSource functional water?

WaterSource focuses on hydrogen-rich alkaline functional water. Its systems are positioned around eight water properties: dissolved hydrogen, moderate alkaline pH, negative ORP, smaller water clusters, oxygenated alkaline ionised water, ionic minerals, filtration and external-use acidic water settings.

How is WaterSource different from a normal water dispenser?

A typical dispenser mainly provides convenient hot or cold water. WaterSource systems are built around water treatment and functional-water properties, including filtration, mineralisation, hydrogen enrichment, pH/ORP characteristics and, depending on model, different drinking and external-use water settings.

Which WaterSource system should I choose?

It depends on your kitchen setup and daily routine. H001 is a countertop hydrogen-rich purifier with instant hot-water convenience. GEM 9000 is an under-sink alkaline hydrogen ionizer for a more integrated kitchen setup. H2 Cap Plus is a portable hydrogen option for personal or on-the-go use.

What do hydrogen, ORP and alkaline pH mean?

Hydrogen refers to dissolved molecular hydrogen in the water. ORP is a water-property reading linked to reduction and antioxidant potential. Alkaline pH describes the water's pH profile. During a consultation, these can be explained in plain language and compared against your home needs.

Does WaterSource also filter the water?

Yes. WaterSource product pages describe filtration as part of the system design. H001 integrates purification, mineralisation, sterilisation, hydrogen enrichment and instant heating, while GEM systems use filter cartridges as part of the ionizer setup. The best option depends on your usage and installation preference.

How often do filters need to be changed?

Filter timing depends on the model and household usage. WaterSource states that GEM filter cycles are designed around a 3,600-litre cycle, approximately six months at 20 litres per day, with voice/LCD reminders. H001 also includes filter replacement reminders and replaceable filter sets.

Can WaterSource provide hot water?

Some models are designed for convenience as well as functional-water use. H001 provides instant water temperature options, while the JOY series includes hot and cold alkaline water dispenser formats. Under-sink GEM systems focus more on ionised water output and kitchen integration.

Is acidic water meant for drinking?

No. In WaterSource's functional-water framework, acidic water is generally positioned for external-use routines such as washing or cleaning applications. Drinking-water use should follow the correct product setting and specialist guidance for the specific machine.

Hydrogen-rich functional water for daily wellness. A trademark brand of Evergreen Health, serving Singapore since 2009.
